practices.soulSync.benefits: ['Calms the amygdala — lowers cortisol and stress arousal.', 'Shifts brainwaves from high-beta (overthinking) to coherent alpha (calm focus).', 'Aligns your inner state with your intentions — opens the door to synchronicity.', 'Dissolves self-centred suffering states — opens the heart to love, connection, and peace.']
practices.sereneMind.howItWorks: ['Focus on your breath — eyes closed, sit upright. Bring your whole, undivided attention to the breath entering and leaving your nostrils.', 'Scan your inner state — notice the emotions and thoughts present right now, without trying to push them away. Ask: "What exact emotion am I feeling?" (anxiety, anger, sadness, peace…)', 'Acknowledge without judgement — gently label the emotion. No judging. No fighting. Soft awareness.', 'See where your mind is — past regrets, future worries, or self-centred chatter? Just acknowledge the state of separation.', 'Flame Visualisation — visualise a steady golden flame glowing between your eyebrows. Slowly draw it inward to the centre of your brain — let it brighten the darkness and stabilise your mind.', 'Close with a smile — let a warm, gentle smile rest on your face. One more deep breath. Feel the shift. Slowly open your eyes.']
practices.dailyReflection.benefits: ['Fosters gratitude — shifts your gaze toward the positive.', 'Closes the day mindfully — releases accumulated tension and stress.', 'Improves sleep — calms the mind before bed.', 'Builds self-compassion — review mistakes without judgement.']
practices.soulSync.howItWorks: ['Conscious Breathing — sit comfortably, hands resting on your thighs, palms facing upward. Eyes closed. Take 8 slow, deep breaths, counting each one with the thumb touching each finger (index to pinky and back).', 'Humming Vibration — bring index finger and thumb together in Jnana Mudra. As you exhale, hum softly like a bee (Bhramari Pranayama). Repeat for 8 breaths. Feel the gentle vibration calm your nervous system.', "Settle in the Silent Pause — between each inhalation and exhalation, rest in the natural stillness. Don't force it — just witness.", 'Repeat "Aham" — with every exhalation, mentally whisper "Aham" (I am — boundless consciousness). Rest in the simple feeling of being.', 'Dissolve and Expand — visualise your body, the room, the entire universe dissolving and expanding into a limitless golden ocean of light. Feel you and existence are not separate.', 'Hold Your Intention — in this expanded state, bring your heartfelt intention to mind. Visualise it manifest. Close with deep gratitude.']

A simple journey from wherever you are to your beautiful state
landing.meditation.breathingCue: Breathe in for 4 counts... Hold... Breathe out for 6 counts
landing.meetGurus.description: For over three decades, Sri Preethaji and Sri Krishnaji have guided millions toward inner transformation. Their teachings focus on moving from a 'suffering state' to a 'beautiful state' through consciousness technology that blends ancient yogic wisdom with modern neuroscience.
landing.meetGurus.disclosure: Guided by their wisdom, powered by AI
landing.meetGurus.quote: "When you are in a beautiful state, you become a blessing to everyone around you. Your very presence heals, your words inspire, and your actions create ripples of transformation."

Guided meditations rooted in the teachings of Sri Preethaji & Sri Krishnaji. Pick the one that meets you today — star your favorites to pin them here.
meditation.guideStepVideo2Desc: Feel your inner emotional state without trying to change it.
meditation.guideStepVideo5Desc: Hold attention on the flame, gently smile and open eyes.
meditation.howDoYouFeel: How do you feel right now?
meditation.obstacleTeacher: Sri Krishnaji teaches that every obstacle is a teacher. Please do Serene Mind now to continue. You can click the button below, or say "can you open serene mind for me" to begin.
meditation.whatInsightArose: What insight arose during your meditation?

memory.fullscreenDesc: Fullscreen view of your interactive personal consciousness map. Drag nodes to move, drag background to pan, scroll to zoom.
practices.sereneMind.purpose: When emotion runs hot and the mind sparks, give yourself three minutes. Serene Mind uses a calming 4-2-6 breath and a gentle flame at the centre of your head to release tension — and return you to a quiet, clear, open mind.
practices.soulSync.purpose: Soul Sync is your way home. You sit, you breathe, you hum — and the noise of the day falls away. You reconnect with the silent presence beneath your thoughts. This is the doorway into a Beautiful State.
practices.title: fallback
Practices
privacy.aiDisclosureText: Responses are generated by an AI grounded in publicly available teachings of Sri Preethaji and Sri Krishnaji. AskMukthiGuru is not a substitute for professional mental-health care.
privacy.intro: AskMukthiGuru is a privacy-first spiritual companion. We collect the minimum data required to deliver the experience: your email (for authentication) and your conversation messages (stored locally on your device via chatStorage so you can pick up where you left off).
privacy.neverSell: Sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.neverTrain: Use your conversations to train external models.
privacy.pageDescription: How AskMukthiGuru handles your data: minimum collection, no third-party sharing, full export and deletion rights under DPDP Act and GDPR.
privacy.storeEmail: Email address & encrypted password (or Google profile) — for sign-in.
